title: Chapter 3
content:
Chapter 3: Chapter 3: Ariel Aquaria

Under the morning sun, Damon walked on a narrow dirt road that surrounded by a forest.

Now his cultivation level at Elementary Spirit Realm - Fifth Level, he feels confident, and with his handsome face and his alluring smile, he sure he can take care any problem in front of him.

As he continued his journey along the trail, a little aimlessly.

As he was still thinking about his next steps, until he noticed a carriage standing on the side of the road.

Its wheel was detached itself form it while a chubby man tried to fix it.

"Ah... Young Taoist!" He called while waving his hands above his head at Damon.

"Can you help me with this?" The chubby man asked for Damon help.

"Hm..." Damon hesitated for a moment but agree to help him.

"Thank you, young Taoist! I’m Alan." Alan smiled.

"I’m Damon," Damon replied, shaking Alan’s hand.

"What are you doing in a place like this?" He looked at the surrounding and the carriage and sensing someone inside the carriage.

"Well... I’m a servant from the Aquaria family of the Crescent Moon City. I’m taking Young Miss Ariel to take part in a sect test in Azure Cloud City."

"Oh... I see." Damon picked up the carriage wheel.

"Azure Cloud City... isn’t that where the Azure Dragon Sect is?" he asked, as he vaguely remembered that name from his memories.

’If the number of points he earned depended on a woman’s power and beauty, what better place to find powerful beauties than a Sect?’

"Has young Taoist Damon ever been to Azure Cloud City?" Alan raised his face in surprise.

"Not really, but I heard about the rumor. The rumor said that the Azure Dragon Sect is the most powerful in the region."

"Oh... It’s a magnificent place," commented Alan. "I hear the Sect is open for recruitment. Many young cultivators are rushing to join..."

Alan paused for a moment, a smile shown his face.

"Well... I’m not trying to brag, but our young miss already at the Fourth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm while she was only 17. With her talent, I’m sure she will be accepted."

"I see..." Damon smiled.

Just then, a graceful and soft voice from inside the carriage and a little woman appeared.

"Alan, is the fix already finished? And who are you talking to?" As soon as she came out of the carriage, the young lady who owned that voice earlier screamed.

"Ahhh!"

Her feet went straight through the step, and she stumbled onto the ground.

"Young Miss!" Alan roared but had no time to act.

Luckily, Damon was already below her, he stretched his arm to catch the little beauty.

"Mm~" A lovely moan came out of the young girl’s delicate lips as she was wrapped in his arms, and landing comfortably against his chest.

She was a young beauty, with long dark blue hair and her skin was white, as pure white as jade. Her face was a round, graceful face with a blush around her cheeks.

Her petite body had few curves on her hanfu, that hugging every inch of her, failed to hide her figure, falling between her thighs and revealing her white, pure skin.

"Are you okay?" asked Damon with a gentle smile on his handsome face.

His left hand sank deep on the young woman’s soft thighs, as the soft flesh spilling out onto his fingers.

While his right hand on the modest breast on her chest giving it a gentle squeeze.

[You touched a noble girl indecently in front of another person, +2 lust points.]

[Remember that lust points can be exchanged for cultivation levels and items in the lust store.]

[Ariel i’s Interest increased by 2 points, +2 lust points!]

[Ariel ’s Lust increased by 10 points, +10 lust points!]

[Name: Ariel Aquaria]

[Age: 17]

[Cultivation: Elementary Spirit Realm - Fourth Level]

[Relationship: Stranger]

[Interest: 2/100]

[Chastity: Intact]

[Lust: 10/100]

[Affinities: Water: 20, Spear: 20]

[Spiritual Roots: Water Spiritual Roots] [Mortal Grade - Mid]

[Bloodline: N/A]

[Physique: N/A]

[Traits: Sensitive Body, Graceful, Hidden Desire, Young Lady, Kind, Naive]

"Ohh..."

Ariel was sinking into Damon’s arms.

Her body trembled as she felt his touch, a strong yet protective touch. Her hands instinctively grabbed the Damon’s robes, pulling his robes and revealing his broad, defined chest.

Her beautiful blue eyes met his gold ones, as if they were calling to her.

Her face flushed instantly.

"Young Miss!" Alan was snapped out her out from her daze, and with a cute little squeak, she jumped out of Damon’s arms.

"Young Miss. Are you alright?" Alan approached, grabbing her shoulders firmly.

"I-I’m fine." as Ariel tried to calm herself down.

But when her eyes on Damon’s again, she looked away immediately, and her face turned a bit red.

Damon looked at her briefly, his eyes scanning toward her clothing, noting the pale skin that exposed through the transparent silk on her shoulder and collar bone before his gaze moved up to the young woman’s embarrassed face.

She was a small, slender woman, about one meter and fifty-five tall, with little curves. He had to admit that she was one of the most adorable women he had ever seen.

"I’m so sorry, young miss. I almost let you hurt. I deserve to die." Alan rushed over and prostrated himself before her.

"Stop that, Alan. I told you, I’m fine. Now get up, you’re embarrassing me," Ariel said, her face growing even redder than before.

Damon couldn’t hold a quiet laugh at the sight of a grown man, well past thirty, throwing himself at the feet of a woman.

When he noticed them both staring at him, he pressed his hands together and spoke: "I must beg your pardon for my rather... impolite approach, young Miss Ariel."

"No, no, it was me who was impolite. You caught me when I fell, and you helped Alan with the carriage."

She pressed her hands together. "Allow me to introduce myself. My name is Ariel Aquaria."

"Damon." He offered her a small smile.

Ariel’s face flushed at the sight of his smile.

[Ariel’s Interest increased by 8 points, +8 lust points!]

Damon was amused by her reaction.

’What a cute and fine woman. I made up my mind. I will make you mine.’
